reasoning: 5/12 bearish consensus (technical bullish outlier). Top risks: (1) CLOSE_CEILING distribution at 732.62 PMH — 5 bars failed to close above, fake breakout risk HIGH if price pushes through; (2) Volume 0.27x avg with 7% contraction — low volume moves don't sustain, reversal likely on any spike; (3) Momentum decelerating with 76% body contraction — conviction fading fast. Asymmetry unfavorable: if bearish holds, target 728.50 ($4.71 risk); if wrong and PMH breaks, target 743.35 ($10.14 reward) but fake breakout makes this likely trap. REDUCE_SIZE to half normal.

risk_factors.description: CLOSE_CEILING at PMH 732.62: 5 consecutive bars with high >= 732.62 but close < 732.62. Fake breakout risk HIGH if price breaks above.
Relative volume 0.27x average. Recent 5 bars avg 9,871 vs prior 5 bars avg 137,809 — only 7% of prior. Low volume makes price movements unreliable.
ROC 5-bar +0.54%, 15-bar +0.44% — weak positive. Body contraction 76% from prior 3 bars to recent 2 bars indicating strong deceleration.
RANGE_DAY: directional_efficiency=0.16 (well below 0.3 threshold). No net directional trend confirmed.
Monthly options expiry Friday June 26 — elevated pin risk to SPY levels. Could force price to specific strikes.
Morning session (10:17 ET) with 282 min to entry cutoff. Theta decay slow before 12:00 ET but expiry context adds time pressure.

tail_risk_scenarios.consequence: Bearish position wins but low volume makes this scenario unlikely to sustain

asymmetry.reward_scenario: Bearish thesis correct: price holds below 732.62 PMH, pulls back to 728.50 PML ($4.71 gain per share)
asymmetry.risk_scenario: Bull trap: price breaks above 732.62, reclaims 734.97 prior close, rallies to 743.35 carry level ($10.14 loss per share from entry at 733.21)

key_observations: CLOSE_CEILING distribution at 732.62 PMH is the dominant risk — 5 bars rejected at resistance signals distribution, not accumulation
Volume collapse (0.27x, 7% of prior) means any move is fragile — could snap either direction on volume return
Momentum clearly decelerating (76% body contraction) — the bounce off overnight lows is fading, supports bearish continuation
Technical agent bullish with ribbon but price below pivot creates mixed signal — ribbon may be lagging indicator in this range day
Pattern scout flags fake_breakout_risk: HIGH if next bar closes above 732.62 — bull trap likely
